log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Water Genasi — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:20+3=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Water Genasi — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:19+9=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 37 damage. Water Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 30/67
Frost Giant attacks Water Genasi — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:18+9=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Water Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 8/67
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Water Genasi — Bardic Musician's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Water Genasi — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Water Genasi — Bardic Musician.
→ Water Genasi — Bardic Musician healed for 6 HP. HP: 14/67
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Water Genasi — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 27 damage. Water Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
